EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMapServerInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the available properties of a map server info object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("47DD2772-2F22-44DF-919B-0D16D8672626")]
public interface IMapServerInfo

Properties

BackgroundColor

The background color of the map (data frame).

IColorDescription BackgroundColor { get; }

Property Value

IColorDescription

Sample Snippet

Bookmarks

The published bookmarks for the map.

IMapServerBookmarks Bookmarks { get; }

Property Value

IMapServerBookmarks

Examples

Sample Snippet

CopyrightText

Copyright information associated with the layer.

string CopyrightText { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultMapDescription

The default map settings.

IMapDescription DefaultMapDescription { get; }

Property Value

IMapDescription

Examples

Sample Snippet

Description

The description of the map (data frame). This property is set in the General tab of the Data Frame Properties dialog.

string Description { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extent

The current extent of the map (data frame).

IEnvelope Extent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

FullExtent

The full extent of the map (data frame).

IEnvelope FullExtent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapLayerInfos

A collection of Map Layer Info objects, each containing information about a layer in the map (data frame).

IMapLayerInfos MapLayerInfos { get; }

Property Value

IMapLayerInfos

Sample Snippet

MapUnits

The units for the map (data frame).

esriUnits MapUnits { get; }

esriUnits

Sample Snippet

MaxScale

The maximum visible scale for the service.

double MaxScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

MinScale

The minimum visible scale for the service.

double MinScale { get; }

double

Name

The name of the map (data frame).

string Name { get; }

string
